tasks.label: Ensure Venv
tasks.command: if [ ! -d .venv ]; then python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

windows.command: if not exist .venv (python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt)

tasks.label: Ensure Translations
tasks.command: if [ ! -f handwriter/translations/ru.qm ] || [ ! -f handwriter/translations/ru.ts ]; then .venv/bin/python handwriter/translations/translate.py; fi

windows.command: if not exist handwriter\translations\ru.qm (.venv\Scripts\python handwriter\translations\translate.py) else if not exist handwriter\translations\ru.ts (.venv\Scripts\python handwriter\translations\translate.py)

tasks.label: Ensure Resources
tasks.command: if [ ! -f handwriter/resources_rc.py ]; then .venv/bin/pyside6-rcc resources.qrc -o handwriter/resources_rc.py; fi

windows.command: if not exist handwriter\resources_rc.py (.venv\Scripts\pyside6-rcc resources.qrc -o handwriter\resources_rc.py)
